join_order.note: adsh_code == sub_row_index → direct O(1) lookup; no hash table needed

filters.note: find IS code at runtime from pre/stmt_dict.txt
find USD code at runtime from num/uom_dict.txt

data_structures.sub_filter: flat_bool_array[86135] indexed by adsh_code (direct O(1) lookup)
data_structures.sub_name: flat_int32_array[86135] indexed by adsh_code (direct O(1) lookup)

pre_join_ht.key: struct PreKey { int32_t adsh, tag, ver; } packed as uint64_t k1=(adsh<<32|tag), uint32_t k2=ver

agg_ht.capacity_formula: next_power_of_2(estimated_groups * 2) — sized for FULL group cardinality per thread (C9)
agg_ht.note: C15: ALL 4 GROUP BY columns in key; stmt_code is constant IS but must be stored

parallelism.scan_phase: parallel morsel scan of num (39.4M rows, morsel=100000); each thread has thread-local agg_ht
parallelism.build_phases: serial (sub: 86K rows trivial; pre: 1.77M rows build once shared read-only ht)
parallelism.merge_phase: sequential merge of thread-local agg_hts into global agg map

aggregation.phase1: thread-local hash aggregation during num scan (SUM(value), COUNT(*))
aggregation.phase2: merge thread-local tables into global hash map

output.topk_strategy: std::partial_sort on global agg result vector (O(n log k), k=200)

load_order.note: parallel morsel scan, probe pre_ht, aggregate

key_encoding.pre_ht_hash: uint64_t k1 = ((uint64_t)(uint32_t)adsh << 32) | (uint32_t)tag_code; uint32_t k2 = ver_code; uint64_t h = k1 * 6364136223846793005ULL ^ (uint64_t)k2 * 1442695040888963407ULL;
key_encoding.agg_ht_hash: uint64_t g1 = ((uint64_t)(uint32_t)name_code << 32) | (uint32_t)tag_code; uint64_t g2 = (uint64_t)(uint32_t)plabel_code; hash combine g1 and g2

correctness_checks.C15: agg key includes ALL 4 GROUP BY cols: name_code, stmt_code, tag_code, plabel_code
correctness_checks.C20: use std::fill not memset for multi-byte sentinel initialization
correctness_checks.C24: all hash probes use bounded for-loop (probe < cap), not unbounded while
correctness_checks.C2: all dict codes resolved at runtime from _dict.txt files
